text.title: Trend Analysis Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Trend Analysis. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Trend declared from a single Twitter buzz spike.
Trend has a score but no Q+1..Q+4 estimate.
antipattern.fix: Mandatory decay-curve emission; reject artefact without it.

antipattern.symptom: Crypto-adjacent fad scored 'structural' off a 1-month spike.
antipattern.root-cause: Did not fit a decay curve.
antipattern.fix: Apply decay-curve heuristic: slope > -10% per quarter -> structural; otherwise hype.
